content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed the review_classification module (src/contexts/workflow_composition/review_classification.rs) end-to-end. The implementation is well-structured: FindingClassification enum with three variants (FixNow, PlannedElsewhere, ProposeNewBead), Severity enum, serde round-trip support with kebab-case tags, and thorough domain validation including bead ID syntax checks (no whitespace, no path separators, no leading/trailing/consecutive dots). The latest diff adds consecutive-dot rejection to validate_bead_id_syntax and a corresponding test — both correct. All 45 tests pass, clippy reports no warnings. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
